M-071.NAME: matrix-style-system
M-071.path: frontend/src/index.css frontend-admin/src/index.css frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-52.xml docs/plans/Phase-53.xml docs/plans/Phase-54.xml
M-071.owns: Shared KrotPN Matrix visual language: color tokens, compact panels, CRT scanlines, neon flicker, glitch accents, focus states, and mobile-safe responsive rules.

reference.source-1: TRUFFLEX styles.css neon flicker, scanline, glitch, matrix fade, and reduced-motion CSS blocks.
reference.source-2: KrotPN compact UI rules from M-038 remain binding for operational dashboards.

public-interfaces.interface-1: CSS custom properties for KrotPN Matrix palette, surfaces, borders, focus rings, and status colors.
public-interfaces.interface-2: Reusable class layer for matrix-visual-shell, matrix-canvas, matrix-scanline-overlay, matrix-vignette, and matrix-visual-content surfaces.
public-interfaces.interface-3: Reduced-motion and mobile viewport rules shared by user and admin frontends.

constraints.constraint-1: Preserve compact operational UX: no marketing landing page, no nested cards, no decorative card-heavy dashboards.
constraints.constraint-2: Matrix green may be the signature color, but the final palette must use controlled cyan, magenta, neutral, warning, and danger accents so the UI is not a one-note green surface.
constraints.constraint-3: Text must not overlap icons, controls, status badges, charts, rows, or adjacent content at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, tablet, and desktop viewports.
constraints.constraint-4: Glitch, scanline, and flicker effects must not reduce readability of form fields, tariff prices, proxy secrets, VPN config actions, admin tables, or incident controls.
constraints.constraint-5: Do not change API contracts, data shapes, auth state, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, or backend runtime behavior.

acceptance.metric-1: User and admin builds pass with shared Matrix CSS tokens applied.
acceptance.metric-2: Viewport smoke confirms no horizontal scroll, no visible text overlap, and stable control dimensions.
acceptance.metric-3: Reduced-motion mode disables transform-heavy and flicker-heavy effects while preserving visual identity.
acceptance.metric-4: Screenshot review confirms Matrix style is present without hiding primary VPN, MTProto, tariff, or admin actions.

evidence.local-2026-06-03: Phase-52 added Matrix palette tokens, canvas/scanline/vignette/content layers, focus-visible rules, reduced-motion CSS policy, protected-surface smoke markers, user/admin builds, and Chrome screenshot checks for mobile, desktop, and reduced-motion login shells.

crosslinks.phase-52: Defines the foundation token system and shared effects.
crosslinks.phase-53: Applies the system to user cabinet routes.
crosslinks.phase-54: Applies the system to admin console routes.
